Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the DAP. This is section number three, phase number three, the products and services category. Now a lot of you guys can go into business or you think about opening up your digital agency. The first thing that you think of, and one of the smartest things that you can think of is what products and services are you gonna sell? For example, as a digital agency owner, I've now opened up transactional services and I offer my recurring services, which are of course what I prefer for recurring revenue sale, but hey, I'm not gonna turn down the one time transactions and I've been able through experience to figure out what's best to sell when dependent on what type of agency you're selling and on top of that, after I help you define the products and services, phase number four, if you already have all your products and services listed out, I'd recommend going into phase number four right away that way you can learn how to sell the shit out of them because I'm gonna teach you every way possible that I've ever figured out and learned how to sell exactly what you know and exactly what you may not know about digital agency services, products, and one time transactions. That being said, even if you do have products, you might wanna watch this section just to figure out if you're doing things the right way or if you could do anything better. We're gonna talk about some efficiencies, a little bit of deliverables, but there's a whole section on operations and delivery, so we're gonna keep it light here and talk more about the actual thinking that goes in to the strategy and to the sequential purchasing that you can have somebody do through an upsell system with having the right products and services. So this is phase number three on your path to become a digital agency owner and get that mid-range six figures number. This is a really important part. I'm gonna need you to keep real close attention. I'm gonna need you to also understand that all these products and services that I've just about are my products and services that I sold when I was a digital agency owner. I want you to know that the products and services that you create could be different from what I offer. It could be specific to a market that you're in that I have no idea exists. I'm teaching you things from my experience that I've worked really well for you that are gonna get you that mid-range six figures number.
